tEn: NVILA: Efficient Frontier Visual Language Models
tZh: NVILA：高效前沿视觉语言模型
sEn: NVILA achieves state-of-the-art accuracy with significantly reduced training cost and latency.
sZh: NVILA在保持顶尖精度的同时，大幅降低了训练成本和延迟。
absEn: Visual language models (VLMs) have made significant advances in accuracy in recent years. However, their efficiency has received much less attention. This paper introduces NVILA, a family of open VLMs designed to jointly optimize efficiency and accuracy. Building on top of VILA, we improve its model architecture by first scaling up the spatial and temporal resolutions, and then compressing visual tokens. This "scale-then-compress" approach enables NVILA to efficiently process high-resolution images and long videos. We further conduct a systematic investigation that enhances NVILA's efficiency throughout its entire lifecycle, from training and fine-tuning to deployment. NVILA matches or surpasses the accuracy of leading open and proprietary VLMs across a wide range of image and video benchmarks. At the same time, it reduces training cost by 1.9-5.1x, prefilling latency by 1.6-2.2x, and decoding latency by 1.2-2.8x. We release our code and models to facilitate reproducibility.
absZh: 视觉语言模型（VLM）近年来在准确性方面取得了显著进展，但其效率问题却较少受到关注。本文介绍了NVILA，一个旨在联合优化效率与准确性的开放VLM系列。基于VILA，我们通过首先扩展空间和时间分辨率，然后压缩视觉令牌来改进模型架构。这种“先扩展后压缩”的方法使NVILA能够高效处理高分辨率图像和长视频。我们进一步进行了系统研究，从训练、微调到部署，全面提升了NVILA的效率。在广泛的图像和视频基准测试中，NVILA在准确性上匹配或超越了领先的开放和专有VLM。同时，它将训练成本降低了1.9-5.1倍，预填充延迟降低了1.6-2.2倍，解码延迟降低了1.2-2.8倍。我们公开了代码和模型以促进可重复性。

contrib.en: Proposes NVILA, a family of open VLMs optimizing both efficiency and accuracy via a 'scale-then-compress' paradigm.
contrib.zh: 提出NVILA，一系列通过“先扩展后压缩”范式同时优化效率和准确性的开放视觉语言模型。

contrib.en: Introduces Dynamic-S2 for adaptive multi-scale high-resolution image processing, improving accuracy on text-heavy benchmarks by up to 30%.
contrib.zh: 引入Dynamic-S2实现自适应多尺度高分辨率图像处理，在文本密集型基准上准确率提升高达30%。

contrib.en: Develops DeltaLoss-based dataset pruning, reducing training data by 50% while maintaining competitive accuracy.
contrib.zh: 开发基于DeltaLoss的数据集剪枝，减少50%训练数据同时保持竞争性准确率。

contrib.en: Implements FP8 mixed-precision training for VLMs, achieving up to 2x speedup over BF16.
contrib.zh: 实现视觉语言模型的FP8混合精度训练，相比BF16实现高达2倍加速。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art results on video benchmarks with efficient temporal scaling and compression.
contrib.zh: 通过高效的时间扩展和压缩，在视频基准上取得最先进结果。

contrib.en: Demonstrates strong performance in downstream tasks including temporal localization, robotic navigation, and medical imaging.
contrib.zh: 在下游任务中展现强劲性能，包括时间定位、机器人导航和医学影像。

limits.en: NVILA's accuracy gains are primarily demonstrated on benchmarks; real-world deployment may face additional challenges.
limits.zh: NVILA的准确率提升主要在基准上验证，实际部署可能面临额外挑战。

limits.en: The 'scale-then-compress' approach may not generalize to all VLM architectures or tasks.
limits.zh: “先扩展后压缩”方法可能不适用于所有视觉语言模型架构或任务。

limits.en: Dataset pruning via DeltaLoss relies on a reference model, adding computational overhead.
limits.zh: 基于DeltaLoss的数据集剪枝依赖参考模型，增加计算开销。

limits.en: FP8 training requires specific hardware (NVIDIA H100/B200), limiting accessibility.
limits.zh: FP8训练需要特定硬件（NVIDIA H100/B200），限制可访问性。

limits.en: The study does not explore the impact of scaling model size beyond 15B parameters.
limits.zh: 研究未探索模型规模扩展至150亿参数以上的影响。

items.en: Abstract: Visual language models (VLMs) have made significant advances in accuracy in recent years. However, their efficiency has received much less attention. This paper introduces NVILA, a family of open VLMs designed to optimize both efficiency and accuracy. Building on top of VILA, we improve its model architecture by first scaling up the spatial and temporal resolutions, and then compressing visual tokens. This “scale-then-compress” approach enables NVILA to efficiently process high-resolution images and long videos. We also conduct a systematic investigation to enhance the efficiency of NVILA throughout its entire lifecycle, from training and fine-tuning to deployment. NVILA matches or surpasses the accuracy of many leading open and proprietary VLMs across a wide range of image and video benchmarks. At the same time, it reduces training costs by 4.5×\times, fine-tuning memory usage by 3.4×\times, pre-filling latency by 1.6-2.2×\times, and decoding latency by 1.2-2.8×\times. We will soon make our code and models available to facilitate reproducibility.
items.zh: 摘要：近年来，视觉语言模型（VLM）在准确性方面取得了显著进展。然而，它们的效率受到的关注要少得多。本文介绍了NVILA，一个旨在优化效率和准确性的开源VLM系列。在VILA的基础上，我们通过首先扩展空间和时间分辨率，然后压缩视觉标记来改进其模型架构。这种“先扩展后压缩”的方法使NVILA能够高效处理高分辨率图像和长视频。我们还进行了系统研究，以提升NVILA在整个生命周期（从训练、微调到部署）中的效率。NVILA在广泛的图像和视频基准测试中匹配或超越了许多领先的开源和专有VLM的准确性。同时，它将训练成本降低了4.5倍，微调内存使用降低了3.4倍，预填充延迟降低了1.6-2.2倍，解码延迟降低了1.2-2.8倍。我们将很快公开代码和模型以促进可重复性。

items.en: Links: Code (on GitHub) | Models (on Hugging Face) | Demo | Subscribe
items.zh: 链接：代码（GitHub） | 模型（Hugging Face） | 演示 | 订阅

items.en: Visual language models (VLMs) have shown remarkable abilities in processing and integrating both visual and textual information, enabling advanced vision-language interactions and dialogues. In recent years, the research community has made tremendous progress in enhancing their accuracy [1, 2, 3, 4, 5] and broadening their applications across diverse domains, including robotics [6, 7], autonomous driving [8], and medical imaging [9]. However, there has been much less focus on improving their efficiency.
items.zh: 视觉语言模型（VLM）在处理和整合视觉与文本信息方面展现了卓越的能力，实现了先进的视觉-语言交互和对话。近年来，研究社区在提升其准确性[1, 2, 3, 4, 5]和拓宽其在机器人[6, 7]、自动驾驶[8]和医学影像[9]等不同领域的应用方面取得了巨大进展。然而，在提升其效率方面的关注却少得多。

items.en: VLMs are expensive across multiple dimensions. First, training a VLM is time-consuming. For example, training a state-of-the-art 7B VLM [5] can take up to 400 GPU days, let alone even larger models. This creates a significant entry barrier for researchers. Second, VLMs often require adaptation when applied to specialized domains (e.g., medical imaging), but fine-tuning a VLM is memory-intensive. For example, fully fine-tuning a 7B VLM can require over 64GB of GPU memory, far beyond the available memory of most consumer-level GPUs. Finally, VLMs are often deployed in edge applications with limited computational budget (e.g., laptops, robots), so deploying a VLM is resource-constrained. Addressing these challenges requires a systematic solution to improve VLM efficiency across all these dimensions.
items.zh: VLM在多个维度上成本高昂。首先，训练一个VLM非常耗时。例如，训练一个最先进的7B VLM [5]可能需要多达400个GPU天，更不用说更大的模型了。这为研究人员设置了显著的入门障碍。其次，VLM在应用于专业领域（如医学影像）时通常需要适配，但微调一个VLM非常消耗内存。例如，完全微调一个7B VLM可能需要超过64GB的GPU内存，远超大多数消费级GPU的可用内存。最后，VLM通常部署在计算预算有限的边缘应用（如笔记本电脑、机器人）中，因此部署VLM受到资源限制。应对这些挑战需要一个系统性的解决方案，以在所有这些维度上提升VLM的效率。

items.en: In this paper, we introduce NVILA, a family of open VLMs designed to optimize both efficiency and accuracy. Building on VILA [2], we improve its model architecture by first scaling up the spatial and temporal resolution, followed by compressing visual tokens. “Scaling” preserves more details from visual inputs, raising the accuracy upper bound, while “compression” squeezes visual information to fewer tokens, improving computational efficiency. This “scale-then-compress” strategy allows NVILA to process high-resolution images and long videos both effectively and efficiently. In addition, we conduct a systematic study to optimize the efficiency of NVILA throughout its entire lifecycle, including training, fine-tuning, and deployment.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了NVILA，一个旨在优化效率和准确性的开源VLM系列。在VILA [2]的基础上，我们通过首先扩展空间和时间分辨率，然后压缩视觉标记来改进其模型架构。“扩展”保留了视觉输入的更多细节，提高了准确性的上限，而“压缩”则将视觉信息压缩到更少的标记中，提高了计算效率。这种“先扩展后压缩”策略使NVILA能够有效且高效地处理高分辨率图像和长视频。此外，我们进行了系统研究，以优化NVILA在整个生命周期（包括训练、微调和部署）中的效率。

items.en: Thanks to these innovations, NVILA is both efficient and accurate. It reduces training costs by 4.5×\times, fine-tuning memory usage by 3.4×\times, pre-filling latency by 1.6–2.2×\times, and decoding latency by 1.2–2.8×\times. It also matches or surpasses the accuracy of many leading open VLMs [3, 4, 2] and proprietary VLMs [10, 11] across a wide range of image and video benchmarks. Furthermore, NVILA enables new capabilities including temporal localization, robotic navigation, and medical imaging. We will release our code and models soon to support full reproducibility. We hope our work will inspire further research on efficient VLMs.
items.zh: 得益于这些创新，NVILA既高效又准确。它将训练成本降低了4.5倍，微调内存使用降低了3.4倍，预填充延迟降低了1.6–2.2倍，解码延迟降低了1.2–2.8倍。它还在广泛的图像和视频基准测试中匹配或超越了许多领先的开源VLM [3, 4, 2]和专有VLM [10, 11]的准确性。此外，NVILA实现了新的能力，包括时间定位、机器人导航和医学影像。我们将很快发布代码和模型以支持完全可重复性。我们希望我们的工作能激发对高效VLM的进一步研究。

items.en: In this section, we begin by designing an efficient model architecture for NVILA, first by scaling up spatial and temporal resolutions, and then by compressing the visual tokens. Next, we present strategies to improve NVILA’s efficiency across its entire lifecycle—from training and fine-tuning to deployment. Unless otherwise specified, all analysis in this section will be based on the 8B model.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们首先为NVILA设计一个高效的模型架构，首先扩展空间和时间分辨率，然后压缩视觉标记。接下来，我们提出提升NVILA在整个生命周期（从训练、微调到部署）效率的策略。除非另有说明，本节中的所有分析将基于8B模型。

items.en: We build NVILA on top of VILA [2]. As in Figure 4, it is an auto-regressive VLM composed of three components: a visual encoder that extracts features from visual inputs (e.g., images, videos); a projector that aligns embeddings across visual and language modalities; and a token processor, typically instantiated with a LLM, which takes both visual and language tokens as input and outputs language tokens. Specifically, NVILA uses SigLIP [12] as its vision encoder, a two-layer MLP as its projector, and Qwen2 [13] of different sizes as its token processor.
items.zh: 我们在VILA [2]的基础上构建NVILA。如图4所示，它是一个自回归VLM，由三个组件组成：一个视觉编码器，从视觉输入（如图像、视频）中提取特征；一个投影器，对齐视觉和语言模态之间的嵌入；以及一个标记处理器，通常由LLM实例化，它接收视觉和语言标记作为输入并输出语言标记。具体来说，NVILA使用SigLIP [12]作为其视觉编码器，一个两层MLP作为投影器，以及不同大小的Qwen2 [13]作为标记处理器。

items.en: The original VILA has very limited spatial and temporal resolutions: i.e., it resizes all images to 448×\times448, regardless of their original size or aspect ratio, and samples up to 14 frames from videos***This is the configuration for VILA-1.5 40B. Their other variants, such as VILA-1.5 3B, only use 384×\times384 resolution and 8 frames.. Both spatial resizing and temporal sampling will introduce significant loss of information, limiting the model’s capability to effectively process larger images and longer videos. This can also be observed in Table 8 and Table 9, where VILA lags behind leading VLMs, especially on text-heavy and long-video benchmarks.
items.zh: 原始的VILA具有非常有限的空间和时间分辨率：即，它将所有图像调整为448×448，无论其原始大小或宽高比如何，并从视频中最多采样14帧***这是VILA-1.5 40B的配置。其他变体，如VILA-1.5 3B，仅使用384×384分辨率和8帧。空间调整大小和时间采样都会引入显著的信息损失，限制了模型有效处理更大图像和更长视频的能力。这也可以在表8和表9中观察到，其中VILA落后于领先的VLM，尤其是在文本密集和长视频基准测试中。

items.en: In this paper, we advocate for the “scale-then-compress” paradigm: first, we scale up the spatial/temporal resolutions to improve accuracy, and then we compress the visual tokens to improve efficiency. Scaling resolutions up improves the performance ceiling, but doing so alone will significantly increase the computational cost. For example, doubling the resolution will double the number of visual tokens, which will increase both training and inference costs by more than 2×\times, as self-attention scales quadratically with the number of tokens. We can then cut this cost down by compressing spatial/temporal tokens. Compressed visual tokens have a higher information density, allowing us to preserve or even improve spatial and temporal details with fewer total tokens.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们提倡“先扩展后压缩”范式：首先，我们扩展空间/时间分辨率以提高准确性，然后压缩视觉标记以提高效率。扩展分辨率提高了性能上限，但仅这样做会显著增加计算成本。例如，将分辨率加倍会使视觉标记数量加倍，这将使训练和推理成本增加超过2倍，因为自注意力机制随标记数量呈二次方扩展。然后，我们可以通过压缩空间/时间标记来降低这一成本。压缩后的视觉标记具有更高的信息密度，使我们能够用更少的标记保留甚至改善空间和时间细节。

items.en: For spatial scaling, it is very natural to directly increase the image resolution of the vision encoder, for example, to 896×\times896. While this may improve performance, applying a uniformly high resolution to all images would be inefficient, especially for smaller images that do not require extensive detail. To address this, we apply S2 [14] to efficiently extract multi-scale high-resolution features with image tiling. For example, given a vision encoder pre-trained at 4482 resolution and an input image with any size, S2 first resizes the image into multiple scales (e.g., 4482, 8962, 13442), and for each scale, it splits the image into tiles of 4482. Each tile is then individually processed by the encoder. The feature maps of each tile from the same scale are stitched back together into the feature map of the whole image at that scale. Finally, feature maps from different scales are interpolated into the same size and concatenated on the channel dimension.
items.zh: 对于空间扩展，很自然地直接增加视觉编码器的图像分辨率，例如，增加到896×896。虽然这可能会提升性能，但对所有图像应用统一的高分辨率将是低效的，尤其是对于不需要大量细节的小图像。为了解决这个问题，我们应用S2 [14]通过图像分块高效提取多尺度高分辨率特征。例如，给定一个在4482分辨率下预训练的视觉编码器和一个任意大小的输入图像，S2首先将图像调整为多个尺度（例如，4482、8962、13442），对于每个尺度，将图像分割成4482的块。然后，每个块由编码器单独处理。来自同一尺度每个块的特征图被拼接回该尺度下整个图像的特征图。最后，来自不同尺度的特征图被插值到相同大小并在通道维度上拼接。

items.en: S2 always resizes images into square, regardless of the original aspect ratio. This can cause distortion, particularly for images that are either tall and narrow or short and wide. To address this, we propose Dynamic-S2, which adaptively processes images with varying aspect ratios. Dynamic-S2 follows the approach of S2 but, at the largest image scale, instead of resizing to a square, it adjusts the image dimensions to the closest size that maintains the original aspect ratio and is divisible by 4482 tiles. This is inspired by the dynamic resolution strategy in InternVL [15]. After processing the tiles, the feature maps from all scales are interpolated to match the size of the largest scale and concatenated.
items.zh: S2总是将图像调整为正方形，无论原始宽高比如何。这可能导致失真，特别是对于高窄或矮宽的图像。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了Dynamic-S2，它自适应地处理具有不同宽高比的图像。Dynamic-S2遵循S2的方法，但在最大图像尺度下，不是调整为正方形，而是将图像尺寸调整为最接近的、保持原始宽高比且能被4482块整除的尺寸。这受到InternVL [15]中动态分辨率策略的启发。处理块后，来自所有尺度的特征图被插值到与最大尺度匹配的大小并拼接。

items.en: Equipped with Dynamic-S2, the model benefits from high-resolution information from the image, resulting in a up to 30% accuracy improvements on text-heavy benchmarks (Table 1). Our goal, then, shifts to compressing the spatial tokens. VILA [2] finds that applying a simple 2×\times2 spatial-to-channel (STC) reshape can reduce the token count by a factor of 4 without sacrificing accuracy. However, pushing this further results in a notable drop in performance: i.e., a nearly 10% decrease in accuracy on DocQA, when reducing the number of minimal tiles and increasing the STC to 3×\times3. We hypothesize that more aggressive reductions make the projector significantly harder to train. To address this, we introduce an additional visual encoder pre-training stage to jointly tune the vision encoder and projectors. This helps recover most of the accuracy loss from spatial token reduction, achieving a 2.4×\times speedup in both training and inference.
items.zh: 配备Dynamic-S2后，模型受益于图像的高分辨率信息，在文本密集的基准测试中准确性提升高达30%（表1）。然后，我们的目标转向压缩空间标记。VILA [2]发现，应用简单的2×2空间到通道（STC）重塑可以将标记数量减少4倍而不牺牲准确性。然而，进一步推进会导致性能显著下降：例如，在DocQA上准确性下降近10%，当减少最小块数量并将STC增加到3×3时。我们假设更激进的减少使得投影器训练更加困难。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一个额外的视觉编码器预训练阶段，以联合调整视觉编码器和投影器。这有助于恢复空间标记减少造成的大部分准确性损失，在训练和推理中实现2.4倍的加速。

items.en: There are many alternative designs for spatial token compression, such as TokenLearner from RT-1 [6] and Perceiver Resampler from MiniCPM-V [16]. However, with the same token reduction ratio, these learnable compression methods surprisingly do not perform better than the simple spatial-to-channel design, even with an additional stage 1.5. We believe this is more of an optimization problem and is beyond the scope of this paper.
items.zh: 还有许多其他空间标记压缩的设计，例如RT-1 [6]的TokenLearner和MiniCPM-V [16]的Perceiver Resampler。然而，在相同的标记减少比例下，这些可学习的压缩方法出人意料地并不比简单的空间到通道设计表现更好，即使有额外的阶段1.5。我们认为这更多是一个优化问题，超出了本文的范围。

items.en: For temporal scaling, we simply increase the number of uniformly sampled frames from the input video. Following previous methods [17], we train the model with additional video-supervised fine-tuning (SFT) to extend its capability to process more frames. From Table 9, extending the number of frames from 8 to 32 can increase the model’s accuracy on Video-MME by more than 5%. However, this will also increase the number of visual tokens by 4×\times.
items.zh: 对于时间扩展，我们简单地增加从输入视频中均匀采样的帧数。遵循先前的方法[17]，我们使用额外的视频监督微调（SFT）训练模型，以扩展其处理更多帧的能力。从表9可以看出，将帧数从8扩展到32可以使模型在Video-MME上的准确性提高超过5%。然而，这也会使视觉标记数量增加4倍。

items.en: Similar to spatial token compression, we will then reduce these visual tokens. Since there is intrinsic temporal continuity in the video, we adopt temporal averaging [18] for compression, which first partitions the frames into groups and then temporally pools visual tokens within each group. This will reduce temporal redundancy (since consecutive frames often contain similar information) while still retaining important spatiotemporal information. Empirically, compressing the visual tokens by 4×\times leads to an acceptable accuracy drop. When compared to the original baseline with the same number of tokens, the first scaled and then expanded result costs almost the same†††We will need to run visual encoder for more frames, but this is usually not the runtime bottleneck., but has much higher accuracy. We have also used this approach to further scale the number of frames and the compression ratio, leading to a state-of-the-art 7B model on this benchmark (see Table 9).
items.zh: 与空间标记压缩类似，我们将减少这些视觉标记。由于视频中存在内在的时间连续性，我们采用时间平均[18]进行压缩，该方法首先将帧分组，然后在每组内对视觉标记进行时间池化。这将减少时间冗余（因为连续帧通常包含相似信息），同时仍保留重要的时空信息。经验上，将视觉标记压缩4倍会导致可接受的准确性下降。与具有相同标记数量的原始基线相比，先扩展后压缩的结果成本几乎相同†††我们需要为更多帧运行视觉编码器，但这通常不是运行时的瓶颈。，但准确性高得多。我们还使用这种方法进一步扩展帧数和压缩比，从而在该基准测试上达到最先进的7B模型（见表9）。

items.en: While state-of-the-art VLMs boast impressive capabilities, training such a VLM is often costly and compute-intensive. This section explores system-algorithm co-design to enable efficient VLM training. On the algorithm front, we examine a novel unsupervised dataset pruning method to streamline training data. At the system level, we investigate FP8 mixed precision for acceleration.
items.zh: 尽管最先进的VLM拥有令人印象深刻的能力，但训练这样的VLM通常成本高昂且计算密集。本节探讨系统-算法协同设计以实现高效的VLM训练。在算法方面，我们研究了一种新颖的无监督数据集剪枝方法以精简训练数据。在系统层面，我们研究了FP8混合精度以加速训练。

items.capEn: Figure 5: DeltaLoss visualizations in NVILA training: Left, Middle, and Right sections show examples that are too easy, distracting, and helpful for training, respectively.
items.capZh: 图5：NVILA训练中的DeltaLoss可视化：左、中、右部分分别展示了过于简单、具有干扰性和有助于训练的例子。

items.en: In order to improve model accuracy, previous work [19, 5, 20] kept grabbing high quality SFT datasets from various sources and can show improvement on Benchmark scores. However, not all data contributes equally to the model and continuous growth of datasets lead to much redundancy. In NVILA, we follow the “Scale-Then-Compress” concept to first increase our SFT dataset mixture and then trying to compress the dataset. However, selecting high-quality examples from various sources is challenging. While there have been explorations of vision inputs [21, 22, 23] and text-only inputs [24, 25, 26], few studies have addressed this problem in VLM training, where images and texts are mixed during training. NVILA’s training involves more than 100M data, making it necessary to prune the training set while maintaining accuracy.
items.zh: 为了提高模型精度，先前的工作[19, 5, 20]不断从各种来源获取高质量SFT数据集，并能在基准测试上显示改进。然而，并非所有数据对模型的贡献都相同，数据集的持续增长会导致大量冗余。在NVILA中，我们遵循“先扩展后压缩”的概念，首先增加SFT数据集的混合，然后尝试压缩数据集。然而，从不同来源选择高质量示例具有挑战性。虽然已有对视觉输入[21, 22, 23]和纯文本输入[24, 25, 26]的探索，但很少有研究解决VLM训练中图像和文本混合训练时的这一问题。NVILA的训练涉及超过1亿数据，因此有必要在保持精度的同时修剪训练集。

items.en: Inspired by recent works in knowledge distillation [27], we leverage DeltaLoss to score the training set:
items.zh: 受近期知识蒸馏工作[27]的启发，我们利用DeltaLoss对训练集进行评分：

items.en: where Disubscript𝐷𝑖D_{i} is the i𝑖i-th subset of the full fine-tuning datasets and D′superscript𝐷′D^{\prime} is the pruned training set. plarge​(x)subscript𝑝large𝑥p_{\text{large}}(x) and psmall​(x)subscript𝑝small𝑥p_{\text{small}}(x) are the output probabilities on the answer tokens. The main motivation is to filter out examples that are either too easy or too hard. To elaborate,
items.zh: 其中D_i是完整微调数据集的第i个子集，D'是修剪后的训练集。p_large(x)和p_small(x)是答案token上的输出概率。主要动机是过滤掉过于简单或过于困难的例子。具体来说：

items.en: If both answer correctly or wrongly, log⁡plarge​(x)psmall​(x)subscript𝑝large𝑥subscript𝑝small𝑥\log\frac{p_{\text{large}}(x)}{p_{\text{small}}(x)} is close to 0.
items.zh: 如果两者都回答正确或错误，log(p_large(x)/p_small(x))接近0。

items.en: When the small model answers correctly but the large model fails, log⁡plarge​(x)psmall​(x)subscript𝑝large𝑥subscript𝑝small𝑥\log\frac{p_{\text{large}}(x)}{p_{\text{small}}(x)} becomes negative, suggesting these examples tend to distract learning and will eventually be forgotten by a more powerful model.
items.zh: 当小模型回答正确但大模型失败时，log(p_large(x)/p_small(x))变为负值，表明这些例子倾向于干扰学习，最终会被更强大的模型遗忘。

items.en: When the small model answers incorrectly but the large model solves it, log⁡plarge​(x)psmall​(x)subscript𝑝large𝑥subscript𝑝small𝑥\log\frac{p_{\text{large}}(x)}{p_{\text{small}}(x)} is positive, suggesting these examples provide strong supervision, as challenging for small models but learnable by larger ones.
items.zh: 当小模型回答错误但大模型正确时，log(p_large(x)/p_small(x))为正值，表明这些例子提供了强监督，因为对小模型有挑战性但大模型可以学习。

items.en: Thereby we can apply DeltaLoss to each sub-dataset and prune the training set with different ratios.
items.zh: 因此，我们可以对每个子数据集应用DeltaLoss，并以不同比例修剪训练集。

items.en: To evaluate the data pruning criterion, we compare DeltaLoss and the random pruning baseline in Table 3. For random pruning, data is randomly selected and we run the results three times and report the average. For cluster pruning, we apply k-means clustering with siglip features and prune the data evenly across each centroid. Our experiments report the average performance across 10 benchmarks, with a focus on key tasks to demonstrate the method’s effectiveness. We examine three pruning threshold 10%, 30% and 50% and notice that DeltaLoss consistently outperforms the random baseline, especially on the GQA and DocVQA tasks the random pruning shows a significant performance degradation while DeltaLoss stays accurate. We notice 50% is a relatively safe threshold where the average score maintains competitive while the training can be speedup by 2×\times. Thus we set the threshold to 50% for later experiments.
items.zh: 为了评估数据修剪标准，我们在表3中比较了DeltaLoss和随机修剪基线。对于随机修剪，数据被随机选择，我们运行三次结果并报告平均值。对于聚类修剪，我们使用siglip特征进行k-means聚类，并在每个质心均匀修剪数据。我们的实验报告了10个基准测试的平均性能，重点关注关键任务以展示方法的有效性。我们检查了三个修剪阈值10%、30%和50%，并注意到DeltaLoss始终优于随机基线，特别是在GQA和DocVQA任务上，随机修剪显示出显著的性能下降，而DeltaLoss保持准确。我们注意到50%是一个相对安全的阈值，平均分数保持竞争力，同时训练速度可提升2倍。因此，我们在后续实验中将阈值设为50%。

items.en: FP16 and BF16 [28] have become standard precisions for model training, since they offer acceleration without accuracy loss, supported natively by NVIDIA GPUs. With the advent of the NVIDIA Hopper and Blackwell architectures, new GPUs (such as H100 and B200) now provide native support for FP8, which has emerged as a promising precision due to its potential for larger computational and memory efficiency.
items.zh: FP16和BF16[28]已成为模型训练的标准精度，因为它们能在不损失精度的情况下提供加速，并得到NVIDIA GPU的原生支持。随着NVIDIA Hopper和Blackwell架构的出现，新GPU（如H100和B200）现在原生支持FP8，FP8因其更大的计算和内存效率潜力而成为一种有前景的精度。

items.en: Many researchers have already applied FP8 to LLM training. NVIDIA’s Transformer Engine performs matrix multiplications (GEMM) in FP8 precision, resulting in faster training speeds. FP8-LM [29] builds upon this by also quantizing the gradients, weight master copy, and first-order momentum into FP8, thereby reducing communication overhead and memory footprint. COAT [30] further compresses activations and the optimizer’s second-order momentum to enhance memory efficiency while maintaining accuracy.
items.zh: 许多研究人员已经将FP8应用于LLM训练。NVIDIA的Transformer Engine以FP8精度执行矩阵乘法（GEMM），从而实现更快的训练速度。FP8-LM[29]在此基础上进一步将梯度、权重主副本和一阶动量量化为FP8，从而减少通信开销和内存占用。COAT[30]进一步压缩激活值和优化器的二阶动量，以在保持精度的同时提高内存效率。

items.en: In this paper, we borrow the FP8 implementation from COAT [30] to accelerate the training of NVILA. One key difference between LLM and VLM training workloads lies in the variability of sequence lengths across batches. In LLM training, samples generally have uniform lengths, and increasing the batch size beyond a certain point has minimal effect on training throughput. However, in VLM training, samples can vary significantly in length: video samples may require tens of thousands of tokens, image samples may need hundreds, and text-only samples require far fewer. As a result, workloads with fewer tokens are generally underutilized and can benefit greatly from increasing the batch size. As shown in Table 4, applying FP8 to both weights and activations allows NVILA to increase the batch size from 4 to 16, resulting in a 2×\times speedup. When gradient checkpointing is enabled, quantizing activations becomes less essential. Instead, we integrate the cross-entropy kernel from Liger [31] to reduce peak memory usage due to Qwen’s large vocabulary size. In this case, FP8 training can still provide a 1.2×\times speedup compared to BF16 training.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们借鉴了COAT[30]的FP8实现来加速NVILA的训练。LLM和VLM训练工作负载的一个关键区别在于批次间序列长度的可变性。在LLM训练中，样本通常具有均匀的长度，增加批次大小超过某一点对训练吞吐量的影响很小。然而，在VLM训练中，样本长度可能差异很大：视频样本可能需要数万个token，图像样本可能需要数百个，而纯文本样本需要的更少。因此，token较少的工作负载通常利用率不足，并且可以从增加批次大小中获益。如表4所示，对权重和激活值都应用FP8使NVILA能够将批次大小从4增加到16，从而实现2倍的加速。当启用梯度检查点时，量化激活值变得不那么重要。相反，我们集成了Liger[31]的交叉熵核，以减少因Qwen大词汇量导致的峰值内存使用。在这种情况下，与BF16训练相比，FP8训练仍能提供1.2倍的加速。

items.en: Once a foundation VLM is trained, domain-specific fine-tuning is needed to adapt the model for specialized tasks or domains. While fine-tuning effectively improves domain-specific vocabulary and concepts, conventional Parameter Efficient Fine-Tuning has been focusing on LLM and text-related tasks, but how to best fine-tune a VLM remains less explored. In NVILA, we find that (i) The learning rate should be set differently for ViT and LLMs (ii) The tuning parts should be chosen dependently for different downstream tasks.
items.zh: 一旦基础VLM训练完成，需要进行领域特定的微调以使模型适应专门的任务或领域。虽然微调有效改进了领域特定的词汇和概念，但传统的参数高效微调主要集中在LLM和文本相关任务上，如何最好地微调VLM仍较少被探索。在NVILA中，我们发现：(i) ViT和LLM的学习率应设置不同；(ii) 对于不同的下游任务，应选择不同的微调部分。

items.en: When fine-tuning the vision encoder (ViT) and language model (LLM) together using PEFT methods, we observe that the learning rate should be set differently for VE and LLM: the learning rate for the ViT part will be 5-50×\times smaller than that for the LLM part. On the other hand, we also observe that fine-tuning the vision encoder with Layernorm can achieve comparable performance as LoRA (Table. 5) while being more computational-efficient: it can reduce the training time by 25% compared to applying LoRA for the vision encoder. With the curated configuration setup, NVILA can be quickly fine-tuned to various downstream tasks under 24 GB memory with on-par performance.
items.zh: 当使用PEFT方法同时微调视觉编码器（ViT）和语言模型（LLM）时，我们观察到ViT和LLM的学习率应设置不同：ViT部分的学习率应比LLM部分小5-50倍。另一方面，我们还观察到，使用LayerNorm微调视觉编码器可以达到与LoRA（表5）相当的性能，同时计算效率更高：与对视觉编码器应用LoRA相比，训练时间可减少25%。通过精心配置的设置，NVILA可以在24 GB内存下快速微调到各种下游任务，性能相当。

items.en: VLMs are often integrated in edge applications as robotic where computational budget is tight. In this section, we will introduce our inference engine with quantization to accelerate the deployment.
items.zh: VLM通常被集成到边缘应用中，如机器人，其中计算预算紧张。在本节中，我们将介绍带有量化的推理引擎，以加速部署。

items.en: We develop a specialized inference engine with quantization techniques to efficiently deploy NVILA. The inference process is divided into two phases: prefilling and decoding In the compute-bounded prefilling stage,, we first apply token compression techniques (Section 2.1) to reduce the inference workload for LLM backbone, after which the vision tower becomes the primary bottleneck, accounting for over 90% of the prefilling latency. To tackle this, we implement W8A8 quantization for the vision tower to reduce NVILA’s Time-To-First-Token (TTFT) in this compute-bounded stage. For the memory-bounded decoding stage, we follow AWQ [32] for W4A16 quantization of the LLM backbone to accelerate. We further optimize the original AWQ implementation by introducing FP16 accumulation to the W4A16 GEMM kernels, resulting to a total 1.7×\times kernel speedup without compromising accuracy. We attach a detailed comparison in Figure. 6
items.zh: 我们开发了一个专门的推理引擎，采用量化技术高效部署NVILA。推理过程分为两个阶段：预填充和解码。在计算受限的预填充阶段，我们首先应用token压缩技术（第2.1节）减少LLM骨干的推理工作负载，之后视觉塔成为主要瓶颈，占预填充延迟的90%以上。为了解决这个问题，我们对视觉塔实现W8A8量化，以减少NVILA在此计算受限阶段的首token时间（TTFT）。对于内存受限的解码阶段，我们遵循AWQ[32]对LLM骨干进行W4A16量化以加速。我们进一步优化了原始的AWQ实现，在W4A16 GEMM核中引入FP16累加，从而在不影响精度的情况下实现1.7倍的核加速。我们在图6中附上了详细比较。

items.en: We follow a five-stage pipeline to train NVILA: (1) projector initialization, (2) visual encoder pre-training, (3) token processor pre-training, (4) image instruction-tuning, and (5) video instruction-tuning. Among them, Stages 1, 3, and 4 are also included in VILA training. The additional Stage 2 is used to recover the accuracy loss due to spatial token compression (as in Table 1), and the additional Stage 5 is helpful for extending the model’s long video understanding capability. We provide the detailed training recipe in Table 7 and data recipe in Table A1.
items.zh: 我们遵循五阶段流程训练NVILA：(1) 投影器初始化，(2) 视觉编码器预训练，(3) token处理器预训练，(4) 图像指令微调，(5) 视频指令微调。其中，阶段1、3和4也包含在VILA训练中。额外的阶段2用于恢复因空间token压缩导致的精度损失（如表1所示），额外的阶段5有助于扩展模型的长视频理解能力。我们在表7中提供了详细的训练配方，在表A1中提供了数据配方。

items.en: Our implementation is built upon PyTorch 2.3.0 [33, 34] and Transformers 4.46.0 [35]. We use DeepSpeed 0.9.5 [36] to shard large models across devices and use gradient checkpointing to reduce memory usage. We adopt FlashAttention-2 [37] to accelerate training in both the LLM and visual encoder. We also implement functional-preserving, on-the-fly sequence packing to fuse samples with different lengths, which leads to an around 30% speedup. We train all models using 128 NVIDIA H100 GPUs with a global batch size of 2048 across all stages. All optimizations are carried out using AdamW with no weight decay. We adopt a cosine learning rate decay schedule with a linear warm-up for the first 3% of the schedule. The initial learning rate varies across stages, as detailed in Table 7.
items.zh: 我们的实现基于PyTorch 2.3.0[33, 34]和Transformers 4.46.0[35]。我们使用DeepSpeed 0.9.5[36]在设备间分片大型模型，并使用梯度检查点减少内存使用。我们采用FlashAttention-2[37]加速LLM和视觉编码器的训练。我们还实现了功能保持的即时序列打包，以融合不同长度的样本，从而带来约30%的加速。我们使用128块NVIDIA H100 GPU训练所有模型，所有阶段的全局批次大小为2048。所有优化均使用AdamW且无权重衰减。我们采用余弦学习率衰减计划，前3%的计划进行线性预热。初始学习率因阶段而异，详见表7。

items.en: As presented in Table 8, we conduct comprehensive evaluations across a diverse range of image benchmarks: AI2D [38], ChartQA [39], DocVQA [40], InfographicVQA [41], MathVista [42], MMMU [43] (with zero-shot CoT), RealworldQA [44], SEED-Bench [45], TextVQA [46], and VQAv2 [47].
items.zh: 如表8所示，我们在多种图像基准上进行了全面评估：AI2D[38]、ChartQA[39]、DocVQA[40]、InfographicVQA[41]、MathVista[42]、MMMU[43]（使用零样本思维链）、RealworldQA[44]、SEED-Bench[45]、TextVQA[46]和VQAv2[47]。

items.en: Our NVILA performs comparably to top open-source models in each size category, including Qwen2-VL [3], InternVL [4], and Pixtral. For general visual question answering tasks (ChartQA, DocVQA, InfoVQA, TextVQA, VQAv2, Seed), NVILA-8B and NVILA-15B achieve competitive or even better results compared to proprietary models (GPT-4o, Gemini). On science related benchmarks (AI2D), NVILA-8B achieves state-of-the-art performance among open-source models. When scaling to 15B, NVILA demonstrates competitive performance with proprietary models.
items.zh: 我们的NVILA在每个规模类别中与顶级开源模型（包括Qwen2-VL[3]、InternVL[4]和Pixtral）表现相当。对于通用视觉问答任务（ChartQA、DocVQA、InfoVQA、TextVQA、VQAv2、Seed），NVILA-8B和NVILA-15B取得了与专有模型（GPT-4o、Gemini）竞争甚至更好的结果。在科学相关基准（AI2D）上，NVILA-8B在开源模型中达到了最先进的性能。当扩展到15B时，NVILA展示了与专有模型竞争的性能。

items.en: Further, on reasoning and knowledge benchmarks such as MMMU, RealworldQA, and MathVista, scores improves more when the model size increase. For benchmarks that require OCR capability such as TextVQA, AI2D, ChartQA, DocVQA, InfoVQA, 8B model can also do a great job. We also show a few qualitative examples in Figure. 2-3 to demonstrate the OCR, reasoning and multi-image capability of NVILA model.
items.zh: 此外，在MMMU、RealworldQA和MathVista等推理与知识基准测试中，随着模型规模增大，得分提升更多。对于需要OCR能力的基准测试，如TextVQA、AI2D、ChartQA、DocVQA、InfoVQA，8B模型也能表现出色。我们还在图2-3中展示了一些定性示例，以展示NVILA模型的OCR、推理和多图像能力。

items.en: We evaluate our models on a range of video understanding benchmarks, spanning short videos of a few seconds to longer videos up to an hour in duration. Table 9 presents the performance of NVILA compared to baseline models. NVILA features long-context capability and can process up to 256 frames. With the scale-then-compress design, NVILA-8B achieves impressive results, setting new state-of-the-art performance across all benchmarks. Notably NVILA reaches performance levels comparable to GPT-4o mini with only 8B parameters and outperforms many larger models.
items.zh: 我们在多个视频理解基准上评估了模型，涵盖从几秒的短视频到长达一小时的视频。表9展示了NVILA与基线模型的性能对比。NVILA具备长上下文能力，可处理多达256帧。通过“先缩放后压缩”的设计，NVILA-8B取得了令人印象深刻的结果，在所有基准上均达到新的最先进水平。值得注意的是，NVILA仅用8B参数就达到了与GPT-4o mini相当的性能水平，并超越了众多更大规模的模型。

items.capEn: Figure 6: NVILA demonstrates superior inference efficiency over the Qwen2-VL model [3] for both image and video understanding tasks. We benchmark NVILA-7B against Qwen2-VL-7B. Qwen2-VL-7B is served by vLLM [48] for W4A16 LLM quantization, while NVILA is quantized and deployed with our specialized inference engine. Specifically, we ablate the efficiency gains achieved with different optimization techniques we introduced in NVILA. NVILA demonstrates 1.6-2.2×\times faster prefilling and up to 2.8×\times higher decoding throughput compared to Qwen2-VL.
items.capZh: 图6：NVILA在图像和视频理解任务上均展现出优于Qwen2-VL模型[3]的推理效率。我们将NVILA-7B与Qwen2-VL-7B进行基准测试。Qwen2-VL-7B由vLLM [48]提供W4A16 LLM量化服务，而NVILA则使用我们专门的推理引擎进行量化和部署。具体来说，我们消融了NVILA中引入的不同优化技术所带来的效率提升。与Qwen2-VL相比，NVILA的预填充速度提升1.6-2.2倍，解码吞吐量提升高达2.8倍。

items.en: NVILA achieves competitive performance on image and video benchmarks while maintaining efficiency through “scale-then-compress”. Architecturally, We initially scale up to native resolution (1–12× more tiles), then compress tokens by 2.4×, achieving higher accuracy with slightly more tokens than previous solutions. Dataset-wise, we curate a diverse 10M sample dataset, compress it using DeltaLoss, and prune to a high-quality 5M subset, consistently outperforms LlaVa-Onevision, which trained on 8M+ data. Besides, we integrate FP8 for acceleration, optimize learning rates for fine-tuning, and use W8A8 format to improve latency and throughput. These full-stack optimizations enable NVILA to train with fewer resources while achieving better performance, less memory usage, and faster inference.
items.zh: NVILA在图像和视频基准上取得了具有竞争力的性能，同时通过“先缩放后压缩”保持了效率。在架构上，我们首先缩放到原生分辨率（1-12倍更多图块），然后将token压缩2.4倍，从而以略多于先前方案的token数实现了更高精度。在数据集方面，我们整理了一个多样化的1000万样本数据集，使用DeltaLoss进行压缩，并修剪到高质量的500万子集，其性能始终优于在800万以上数据上训练的LlaVa-Onevision。此外，我们集成了FP8加速，优化了微调的学习率，并使用W8A8格式来改善延迟和吞吐量。这些全栈优化使NVILA能够以更少的资源进行训练，同时实现更好的性能、更少的内存使用和更快的推理。

items.en: We compare NVILA’s inference performance against Qwen2-VL [3] as shown in Figure 6. For a fair comparison, both models process video inputs by sampling 64 frames, with all experiments conducted on a single NVIDIA RTX 4090 GPU. Qwen2-VL is quantized to W4A16 and deployed with vLLM [48], a LLM/VLM serving engine with state-of-the-art inference speed. For NVILA, we quantize the LLM backbone to W4A16 and vision tower to W8A8. With our specialized inference engine, NVILA achieves up to 2.2×\times speedup in prefilling stage and up to 2.8×\times higher decoding throughput over Qwen2-VL.
items.zh: 我们将NVILA的推理性能与Qwen2-VL [3]进行了比较，如图6所示。为了公平比较，两个模型均通过采样64帧处理视频输入，所有实验均在单个NVIDIA RTX 4090 GPU上进行。Qwen2-VL被量化为W4A16，并使用vLLM [48]部署，vLLM是一个具有最先进推理速度的LLM/VLM服务引擎。对于NVILA，我们将LLM骨干量化为W4A16，视觉塔量化为W8A8。借助我们专门的推理引擎，NVILA在预填充阶段实现了高达2.2倍的加速，解码吞吐量比Qwen2-VL高出2.8倍。

items.en: Following LITA, we also add support for temporal localization in NVILA. We add discrete time tokens to indicate the timestamps in the video, and use the smoothed cross entropy loss to train the model. From the results in Table 10, we can clearly see that NVILA substantially outperforms all baselines for all metrics.
items.zh: 继LITA之后，我们还在NVILA中增加了对时间定位的支持。我们添加了离散时间token来指示视频中的时间戳，并使用平滑交叉熵损失来训练模型。从表10的结果可以清楚看出，NVILA在所有指标上均大幅优于所有基线。

items.capEn: Figure 7: NVILA deployed as a Vision-Language Navigation agent, navigating environments using language instructions and visual observations (Top: simulation, Bottom: real-world). The real-world setup features a Unitree Go2 robot equipped with a LiDAR sensor at the base of its head and an Intel RealSense Camera mounted on top. On the server side, an RTX 4090 GPU powers the NVILA-8B model, configured with an 8-frame context length for action generation.
items.capZh: 图7：NVILA作为视觉语言导航智能体部署，使用语言指令和视觉观察在环境中导航（上：仿真，下：真实世界）。真实世界设置包括一个Unitree Go2机器人，其头部底部装有LiDAR传感器，顶部装有Intel RealSense摄像头。在服务器端，RTX 4090 GPU为NVILA-8B模型提供动力，配置8帧上下文长度用于动作生成。

items.en: NVILA can serve as a strong foundation for robotic agents in Vision-Language Navigation [49] and empower real-time deployment on non-server devices. At each time step t𝑡t, the agent receives a language instruction and a video observation, plans the next action, and transitions to the next state t+1𝑡1t+1, where it receives a new observation. NVILA’s efficient and flexible handling of multi-frame inputs enables seamless integration of historical and current observations into VLMs. The NaVILA framework [50] introduces a tailored navigation prompt and fine-tunes NVILA using navigation-specific SFT data curated from the simulator [51]. Quantitative results in Table 11 show that NVILA’s straightforward design achieves state-of-the-art results on VLN-CE. Visual results of real-time deployment of the navigation model based on NVILA-8B on a single laptop GPU for navigation tasks are presented in Fig. 7. The entire system can operate seamlessly with an end-to-end (camera→→\rightarrowGPU→→\rightarrowaction) pipeline running at 1Hz.
items.zh: NVILA可以作为视觉语言导航[49]中机器人智能体的强大基础，并支持在非服务器设备上的实时部署。在每个时间步t，智能体接收语言指令和视频观察，规划下一个动作，并转换到下一个状态t+1，在那里接收新的观察。NVILA高效灵活地处理多帧输入，使得历史和当前观察能够无缝集成到VLM中。NaVILA框架[50]引入了定制的导航提示，并使用从模拟器[51]整理的导航特定SFT数据对NVILA进行微调。表11中的定量结果表明，NVILA的简洁设计在VLN-CE上取得了最先进的结果。基于NVILA-8B的导航模型在单台笔记本电脑GPU上实时部署的视觉结果如图7所示。整个系统可以以1Hz的频率无缝运行端到端（摄像头→GPU→动作）流水线。

items.en: NVILA also offers transformative potential in the medical domain. Such integration promises advancements in diagnostic accuracy, clinical decision-making, and data interpretation.
items.zh: NVILA在医疗领域也提供了变革潜力。这种集成有望推动诊断准确性、临床决策和数据解释的进步。

items.en: The NVILA-M3 framework [9] introduces a novel approach by integrating multiple domain-expert models tailored to specific medical tasks, such as image segmentation and classification (Fig. 8). These expert models are designed to extract and interpret intricate features that are otherwise difficult for general VLM’s to discern. By coupling these specialized models with a vision-language learning paradigm, NVILA-M3 achieves enhanced performance, facilitating the learning of nuanced relationships between visual inputs and their textual annotations. This integration not only improves task-specific outcomes but also sets a foundation for the development of more robust and context-aware VLMs in the healthcare domain. NVILA-M3 indicated that an overall improvement of 9% can be achieved via usage of expert models over existing SOTA, a few key results can be observed in Table. 12. This underscores the importance of leveraging domain expertise to bridge the gap between generalized AI capabilities and the demands of specialized applications, demonstrating the potential for VLMs to revolutionize fields where precision and specificity are paramount.
items.zh: NVILA-M3框架[9]引入了一种新颖的方法，通过集成多个针对特定医疗任务（如图像分割和分类）的领域专家模型（图8）。这些专家模型旨在提取和解释一般VLM难以辨别的复杂特征。通过将这些专门模型与视觉语言学习范式相结合，NVILA-M3实现了增强的性能，促进了视觉输入与其文本注释之间细微关系的学习。这种集成不仅改善了任务特定结果，还为在医疗领域开发更鲁棒和上下文感知的VLM奠定了基础。NVILA-M3表明，通过使用专家模型，可以在现有最先进技术基础上实现9%的总体改进，表12中展示了一些关键结果。这强调了利用领域专业知识弥合通用AI能力与专业应用需求之间差距的重要性，展示了VLM在精度和特异性至关重要的领域进行变革的潜力。

items.capEn: Figure 8: Overview of M3 depicting integration of domain expert model with NVILA. Expert model cards are information for NVILA to decide which expert model to call and then utilize results before providing a response to the user. Top: Reference model cards can be seen and multiple use-case queries that a user could present such as segmentation and identification of tumor. Bottom: With guidance of expert models M3 can provide more accurate responses
items.capZh: 图8：M3概述，展示了领域专家模型与NVILA的集成。专家模型卡片是NVILA决定调用哪个专家模型并在向用户提供响应之前利用结果的信息。上：可以看到参考模型卡片以及用户可能提出的多个用例查询，例如分割和识别肿瘤。下：在专家模型的指导下，M3可以提供更准确的响应。

items.en: VLMs, especially proprietary ones, have advanced rapidly over the past two years. For example, OpenAI has upgraded from GPT-4V [52] to GPT-4o [10], achieving a 5–10% performance gain across image and video QA benchmarks. Google has extended the context length to 1M in Gemini Pro 1.5 [53], a significant improvement over Gemini 1.0 [54]. It now ranks at the top of the Video-MME leaderboard [55] for long video understanding. Anthropic has released Claude 3.5 [11], which demonstrates better benchmark scores than GPT-4o, showcasing notable improvements over Claude 3 [56]. Other proprietary models have similar advancements, such as Apple’s upgrade from MM1 to MM1.5 [57] and xAI’s upgrade from Grok-1.5 [44] to Grok-2 [58].
items.zh: VLM，尤其是专有VLM，在过去两年中取得了快速进展。例如，OpenAI已从GPT-4V [52]升级到GPT-4o [10]，在图像和视频问答基准上实现了5-10%的性能提升。Google将Gemini Pro 1.5 [53]的上下文长度扩展到100万，相比Gemini 1.0 [54]有显著改进。它目前在长视频理解的Video-MME排行榜[55]上名列前茅。Anthropic发布了Claude 3.5 [11]，其基准分数优于GPT-4o，相比Claude 3 [56]有显著提升。其他专有模型也有类似进展，例如Apple从MM1升级到MM1.5 [57]，xAI从Grok-1.5 [44]升级到Grok-2 [58]。

items.en: Meanwhile, open-source VLMs continue to evolve, improving at both the system/framework level [59] and the algorithm/recipe level [2], progressively narrowing the performance gap between proprietary and open-source models [17, 60, 61, 62]. These recent advancements have led many open VLM models to claim performance levels comparable to, or even exceeding, leading proprietary models such as GPT-4V and GPT-4o. Some representative examples include InternVL2 [4], Qwen2-VL [3], LLaVA-OneVision [5], Llama 3.2 Vision [63], Molmo [64], NVLM [62], and MiniCPM-V [16].
items.zh: 与此同时，开源VLM持续演进，在系统/框架层面[59]和算法/配方层面[2]都有改进，逐步缩小了专有模型与开源模型之间的性能差距[17, 60, 61, 62]。这些最新进展使得许多开源VLM声称其性能水平可与甚至超过领先的专有模型，如GPT-4V和GPT-4o。一些代表性例子包括InternVL2 [4]、Qwen2-VL [3]、LLaVA-OneVision [5]、Llama 3.2 Vision [63]、Molmo [64]、NVLM [62]和MiniCPM-V [16]。

items.en: Despite significant advancements in model performance, much less focus has been placed on enhancing the efficiency of training, inference, and fine-tuning for these models. This paper aims to explore how to develop VLMs that are not only highly accurate but also optimized for end-to-end efficiency.
items.zh: 尽管模型性能取得了显著进步，但对提升这些模型的训练、推理和微调效率的关注却少得多。本文旨在探索如何开发不仅高度准确，而且针对端到端效率进行优化的VLM。

items.en: Prior works such as [65, 66, 67, 68, 69, 70, 71, 72] have explored token reduction techniques in both spatial and temporal dimensions. However, none have focused on reducing the number of tokens for a frontier Vision-Language Model (VLM). For dataset pruning, promising approaches have been proposed for selecting pretraining data for Large Language Models (LLMs), such as domain-mixing [73], sample-wise data selection [25, 74], and theory-driven optimal selection [26]. In this work, we specifically focus on pruning supervised fine-tuning (SFT) datasets for VLMs. Regarding low-precision training, FP8 training [75, 76] has gained popularity for LLMs, yet no prior work has demonstrated its feasibility for VLMs without sacrificing accuracy. Techniques such as pruning, distillation, and quantization are commonly applied to LLMs. [77, 78] apply pruning/distillation to LLM. However, their application to VLMs presents an open question: Should an LLM be pruned or distilled first before integrating a vision encoder, or should the VLM itself be pruned or distilled after training? Similarly, quantization techniques like AWQ [32] and GPTQ [79] are well-documented for LLMs, and VILA [2] has shown that AWQ can be directly applied to VLMs. However, little attention has been given to quantizing vision encoders, which becomes critical when handling higher-resolution images or videos due to the increased computational demands. Parameter-efficient fine-tuning methods such as LoRA [80], DoRA [81], QLoRA [82], and GaLoRA [83] are widely used for LLMs to reduce memory requirements. However, for VLMs, which combine a vision encoder with an LLM, efficient fine-tuning techniques are still underexplored. Addressing this gap is crucial for advancing VLM fine-tuning with limited computational resources.
items.zh: 先前的工作如[65, 66, 67, 68, 69, 70, 71, 72]探索了空间和时间维度上的token缩减技术。然而，没有一项工作专注于减少前沿视觉语言模型（VLM）的token数量。对于数据集修剪，已经提出了有前景的方法用于选择大型语言模型（LLM）的预训练数据，例如领域混合[73]、样本级数据选择[25, 74]和理论驱动的最优选择[26]。在这项工作中，我们特别关注修剪VLM的监督微调（SFT）数据集。关于低精度训练，FP8训练[75, 76]在LLM中已变得流行，但尚无先前工作证明其在VLM中不牺牲准确性的可行性。诸如剪枝、蒸馏和量化等技术通常应用于LLM。[77, 78]将剪枝/蒸馏应用于LLM。然而，它们在VLM上的应用提出了一个开放性问题：在集成视觉编码器之前是否应该先对LLM进行剪枝或蒸馏，还是在训练后对VLM本身进行剪枝或蒸馏？类似地，量化技术如AWQ [32]和GPTQ [79]在LLM中已有充分记录，VILA [2]已表明AWQ可以直接应用于VLM。然而，对视觉编码器量化的关注很少，这在处理更高分辨率图像或视频时由于计算需求增加而变得至关重要。参数高效微调方法如LoRA [80]、DoRA [81]、QLoRA [82]和GaLoRA [83]广泛用于LLM以减少内存需求。然而，对于结合了视觉编码器和LLM的VLM，高效的微调技术仍未得到充分探索。解决这一差距对于在有限计算资源下推进VLM微调至关重要。

items.en: This paper introduces NVILA, a family of open VLMs designed to strike an optimal balance between efficiency and accuracy. By adopting the “scale-then-compress” paradigm, NVILA can efficiently process high-resolution images and long videos while maintaining high accuracy. We also systematically optimize its efficiency across the entire lifecycle, from training to fine-tuning to inference. NVILA delivers performance that matches or exceeds current leading VLMs, while being significantly more resource-efficient. Moreover, NVILA opens up new possibilities for applications such as temporal localization, robotic navigation, and medical imaging. We will make our models available soon. We hope NVILA can empower researchers and developers to fully unlock its potential across a wide range of applications and research domains.
items.zh: 本文介绍了NVILA，一个旨在实现效率与准确性最佳平衡的开源VLM系列。通过采用“先缩放后压缩”范式，NVILA能够高效处理高分辨率图像和长视频，同时保持高准确性。我们还系统地优化了其从训练到微调再到推理的整个生命周期的效率。NVILA的性能达到或超过当前领先的VLM，同时资源效率显著更高。此外，NVILA为时间定位、机器人导航和医学成像等应用开辟了新的可能性。我们将很快发布我们的模型。我们希望NVILA能够赋能研究人员和开发者在广泛的应用和研究领域中充分释放其潜力。
